name: Chime of Opening
overview: A hollow metal tube that casts the Knock spell when struck.

properties.physical_description: Hollow metal tube measuring about 1 foot long and weighing 1 pound
properties.activation: As a Magic action, you can strike the chime to cast Knock
properties.sound: The spell's customary knocking sound is replaced by the clear, ringing tone of the chime, which is audible out to 300 feet
properties.uses: The chime can be used 10 times. After the tenth time, it cracks and becomes useless.
